visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a checkered newsboy cap and black-rimmed glasses sits in the driver's seat of a car. He holds a smartphone in his hand and looks towards the camera, gesturing as he speaks. The interior of the car is visible, including the steering wheel and the side window revealing a street environment with blurred signs in the background. (2) The camera zooms in on the smartphone screen held by the man. The screen displays the Suica card interface within a digital wallet app. The man uses his thumb to navigate the app, selecting a top-up amount of 5,000 Yen. The lighting is bright and natural, coming from outside the car. (3) The man turns the phone screen towards the camera to show the transaction status. A processing animation is briefly visible before a checkmark appears, indicating a successful payment. He smiles and points to the screen, showing the updated balance. The camera remains mostly static at eye-level.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 老闆你在衝三毀. (2) [Subtitle]: 我跟你講. (3) [Subtitle]: 誒超酷的. (4) [Subtitle]: 你知道為什麼嗎呢. (5) [Subtitle]: 現在日幣呢. (6) [Subtitle]: 0.209對不對. (7) [Subtitle]: 我現在馬上. (8) [Subtitle]: 來加值一下我的西瓜卡. (9) [Subtitle]: 太及時了吧. (10) [Subtitle]: 先按加值. (11) [Subtitle]: 因為我現在餘額嘛. (12) [Subtitle]: 加個5000. (13) [Subtitle]: 加5000新增. (14) [Subtitle]: 然後呢馬上付錢. (15) [Subtitle]: 正在處理付款. (16) [Subtitle]: 因為現在呢. (17) [Subtitle]: 你換算起來其實是划算的. (18) [Subtitle]: 成功!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a black and white checkered cap, glasses, a white t-shirt with a black graphic, and a wooden bead bracelet on his wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a parked or moving car, showing the steering wheel and dashboard. Through the side window, street-level shops and signs are visible, indicating an urban setting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male speaker begins a clear, high-quality voice recording inside a quiet car environment. He speaks in a conversational, enthusiastic tone, discussing the current low Japanese Yen exchange rate. The background noise floor is minimal, limited to low-level room tone. (2) A subtle digital notification 'ping' or UI sound occurs as he interacts with his phone. His speech continues without interruption, maintaining a moderate pace and clear articulation. (3) The speaker's pitch rises slightly at the end of the clip as he expresses excitement over the successful transaction. No background music is present, keeping the focus entirely on the vocal information and sparse UI sound effects.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video provides a quick tutorial on how to top up a Suica card using Apple Wallet, specifically highlighting the benefit of doing so during a period when the Japanese Yen exchange rate is low.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video appears to be a personal sharing of a lifestyle tip rather than a paid promotion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A clear and practical short-form tutorial with high production value for social media.
